name: CineHover
description: Cinematic hover previews for Jellyfin movies and series.
overview: Adds cinematic hover panels with trailers, metadata, production flags and compact language badges to Jellyfin Web.

versions.changelog: CineHover 0.2.1-beta: corrected package structure and mobile hover disabling fix.

First beta release. CineHover is now installable through the Jellyfin plugin repository manifest and includes automatic JavaScript Injector loader registration, movie and series hover previews, trailer support, language badges and improved documentation. Some known bugs remain and feedback is welcome.
